works in manufacturing too. started entry level at 10.00 an hour got a 'raise to 10.50, jumped ship after 1 year boom 14.00 an hour, layoff from that job weny to another company 16.00 got a taise to 16.50 quit that job after 9 months got a job working 20.00 an hour and once again quit, went to another company now i make 23.50 an hour. 4 years manufacturig experience, 5 job changes 10.00-> 23.50, only two of those pay increases came from raises.my parents were genuinely wortied about mr quitti

Pour over coffees at home poured into a nice Zojirushi travel mug. Back when I used a Grind-n-Brew drip maker, the grinder wasn't very good and automatic drips provide lower-quality extraction. My cheap IKEA thermos also didn't hold heat terribly well, so I'd make coffee in the morning, drink about half of it and then go and get Starbucks later in the day. I dropped around $200 on equipment (well, I would have, but half of that came from gifts from my in-laws) and now I have a much better coffee

As Stroud said, Swiftcast is basically mandatory for higher content, and in general is really helpful after you hit level 28 (I think 28 is where you get the trait to allow in-combat resurrection).You'll also get Blizzard II along the way, which is more AoE than you'll have until Holy at 45.  Surecast as well, but surecast has...much more limited applications in general PvE content.  Thaumaturge to 26 WILL happen to you eventually if you're playing a caster or healer, simply for swiftcast.  The

I caught a lot of flack for asking this on another forum a decade or so ago.  My point was that it's either genetic or else an affectation, and suggesting it to be either was gas on the flames.  Born this way, not a choice, but we're not mutants, blah blah.  It's just a result of group psychology.  You identify with your group.  Suggesting they're in a group made the anger even worse.  Just a sore subject I guess.

It's natural that once the first rush of emotions wears off, many people are not quite as intensely attracted to their partners anymore. Usually sex slows down a little bit, though it doesn't always. Only you can decide if this is that, and you both just need to keep working to spice things up and keep that connection strong, or if you're really not attracted to her anymore or perhaps are falling out of love with her.

You are presuming these are conscious choices.  For one example: gay/bi people are physiologically aroused by the same sex before they've even recognised it consciously.  I think it's possible that in less permissive areas/societies people who use COGFUNC_MENTION are perhaps more likely to be comfortable with their deviation from the group, but that's as far as I would go.  Alternatively perhaps you ascribe to the "one gender" idea?  Experimentally that doesn't really hold up.  See above.
